tagline: Transforming High-Performance API Development and Database Optimization into Business Value

work_experience.description: Developed high-performance APIs using Spark and Apache Kafka to process large datasets in real-time. Optimized database performance using indexing and query tuning techniques, resulting in a 30% reduction in latency and a 25% increase in throughput.
Designed and implemented a real-time data pipeline using Spark, Apache Kafka, and Apache Cassandra to process and evaluate machine learning models. Achieved a 90% accuracy rate in model evaluation.

Developed a scalable RESTful API using Spring Boot and MySQL to process large datasets in real-time. Optimized database performance using indexing and query tuning techniques, resulting in a 20% reduction in latency and a 15% increase in throughput.
Optimized database performance using indexing and query tuning techniques, resulting in a 40% reduction in latency and a 30% increase in throughput.

projects.name: Developing a Scalable RESTful API for Real-Time Data Processing
projects.description: Designed and implemented a high-performance RESTful API using Spark, Apache Kafka, and Apache Cassandra to process real-time data. Achieved a 30% reduction in latency and a 25% increase in throughput.

projects.name: Optimizing Database Performance using Indexing and Query Tuning
projects.description: Analyzed and optimized a large-scale database using indexing and query tuning techniques. Reduced query execution time by 50% and improved database response time by 20%. Developed a scalable RESTful API using Spring Boot and MySQL to process large datasets in real-time.

projects.name: Building a Real-Time Data Pipeline using Spark and Machine Learning
projects.description: Designed and implemented a real-time data pipeline using Spark, Apache Kafka, and Apache Cassandra to process and evaluate machine learning models. Achieved a 90% accuracy rate in model evaluation.

layout_strategy: A clean and modern design with a focus on white space and simplicity. Use a consistent color scheme throughout the portfolio to create a cohesive brand identity. Incorporate high-quality images and icons to break up text and add visual interest.
template_dif: Apply a 1.5px border radius to all elements
Set a minimum font size of 14px for all text
Use a consistent font family throughout the portfolio
Incorporate a hover effect on all clickable elements
